form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 0.8 lengths over 400m at Bulli in a handy 22.69, beating Twisted Huxley. Can make it two on the bounce.

form.formComment: Went down narrowly in a Grade 5 at this track latest when a nose second but did record an excellent 29.64 for the 520m trip. Has the ability and looks hard to top.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Nowra over 520m in 29.68. Followed that up with a minor placing over 520m at this track at Grade 5 five days ago. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 5 over 520m at this track behind Wonder I Do beaten 14 lengths (30.58). Has clocked a blistering 29.75 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th in a Grade 4/5 on April 6 over 520m at Nowra behind Dynamic Drummer beaten 17 lengths (30.57). Placed two back at Nowra. Top-three hope with the right run.
